evidence.notes: Unit 74/74 PASS against be-dev impl (commit 92b0af8). Integration tests not executed: (1) Supabase direct host IPv6-only and host has no IPv6; (2) prod-DB alembic upgrade denied by auto-mode classifier — requires explicit user authorization or pooler URL.

blockers.detail: Supabase direct host db.<ref>.supabase.co resolves to IPv6 only; this host has no IPv6 connectivity. Need pooler URL (aws-0-<region>.pooler.supabase.com:6543/5432) in .env.
alembic upgrade against prod Supabase blocked by Claude Code auto-mode classifier (teammate agent directive insufficient; requires direct user authorization per agent-workflow.md §5-§6).

next_action.command: Provide Supabase pooler URL in .env OR authorize prod-DB migration explicitly OR provide a local/dev Postgres TEST_DATABASE_URL.
